ingredients: 4 ea. (400 g) medium onions, chopped as fine as possible
2 large cloves of garlic, chopped finely or crushed
Ginger (about the same as the garlic in size), finely chopped
procedure: Cook the ingredients in the order listed, giving the onions some time before adding everything else.
Put the lid on and cook until the lentils are cooked to your preference.
